gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/97)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/97)
text: كَتَبْتُ إِلَيْهِ رَجُلٌ مَاتَ وَ جَعَلَ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ لَهُ فِي حَيَاتِهِ لَكَ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلَدٌ ثُمَّ إِنَّهُ أَصَابَ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ وَلَداً وَ مَبْلَغُ مَالِهِ ثَلَاثَةُ آلَافِ دِرْهَمٍ وَ قَدْ بَعَثْتُ إِلَيْكَ بِأَلْفِ دِرْهَمٍ فَإِنْ رَأَيْتَ جَعَلَنِيَ اللَّهُ فِدَاكَ أَنْ تُعْلِمَنِي فِيهِ رَأْيَكَ لِأَعْمَلَ بِهِ فَكَتَبَ أَطْلِقْ لَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Al Husayn, from Maalik who said,

‘I wrote to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A man died and made everything of his during his lifetime, to be for you<sup>asws</sup>, and there was no child for him. Then a child was born (after his death) and his wealth had reached three thousand Dirham, and I had sent to you a thousand Dirhams. May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>, So if you<sup>asws</sup> could let me know your<sup>asws</sup> view with regards to it, so that I can act upon it’. So he<sup>asws</sup> wrote: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> leave it for them’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from al-Husayn ibn Malik who has narrated the following: “I once wrote to him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘A man has died who in his lifetime had made everything that he had for you and he did not have any children, thereafter a child was born to him and his assets are three thousand dirham. He has sent to you one thousand dirham. I like to know your decision in the matter so I can follow.’ He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, wrote the answer that said, ‘I leave it for them.’”
